title: Chameleon Mod
description: Checkout the V2 of this mod, which is a fully recreation with many more features, made a year later but much better.
body:
In this mod you can make and hatch an chameleon egg to get a Chameleon, this chameleon talks to you but has the memory of a goldfish (couple seconds before forgetting) take care of you new friend protect it from your friends, and Enjoy!

![Steel Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b318e91f6025f80c07b8b752ccf33a0acd5bc0ec.png)
![Incubator Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cad3849839028c01c7d405b3a77e6619855861a.png)
![Chameleon Egg Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/049b7ac513ed20b708a4ee69abcb21e2f3cba465.png)

Right-Click it on an Incubator
![Using Egg On Incubator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4395df943b26fbab933976c4b1d648117dcf277b.png)

![After Using On Incubator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45deb3584a60b407477e028827a690de2b1abb59.png)
